proofreader.assertion: Output contains two sections: corrected text and a numbered change log
Every correction in the change log corresponds to an actual change in the corrected text
Corrections follow the specified language variant (British English spelling and conventions)

copy-editor.assertion: Output contains two sections: edited text and an editorial note with 3-5 bullet points
Editorial note identifies patterns and recurring issues, not just individual fixes
Substantive issues are flagged in the editorial note rather than silently rewritten
